$comment: Required design-token contract. Every client's app/globals.css :root MUST define all of these CSS custom properties so any core component that references them renders correctly under that client's theme. Enforced by backend/scripts/check-token-contract.sh. See PLATFORM_VERSIONING_AND_SYNC_GUIDE.md §5.
notes: When core adds a component that needs a NEW token, add the token here in the same release and document it in the CHANGELOG entry's 'Design impact' field so every client adds it before merging.
